sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82126" key="periskoutlo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περισκουτλόω</orth> (Lat. <sense id="n82126.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scutula), cover</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">surround with marble slabs, Jahresh..</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4019.tlg003:3:206" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.206</biblScope> </bibl> (Termessus, <date TEIform="date">ii A. D.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
